final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, ssbid1000m, shape_area, geom FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838,25833);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, opphav, malemetode, vannstandovernn2000, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838,25833);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: aggregate

-- aggregation_type: "count"
